allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\) -split ";" | Select-String -Pattern "node|npm" -SimpleMatch)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs", "$env:APPDATA\\npm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
